full_text:
Clay pitchers placed in govt depts in Hathras dist amid heatwave
Officials said the initiative is aimed at ensuring that people visiting govt offices during the severe heat do not face inconvenience. The DM emphasised strict compliance, stating: “In view of the extreme heat and continuous increase in temperature, it is very important to make proper arrangements for clean and cool drinking water in every office for the convenience of the general public, complainants and employees.”
The order further directed that drinking water systems must operate smoothly and be monitored regularly to avoid complaints. Departmental heads have been asked to ensure strict adherence across all subordinate offices.
